title: Discrete Mathematics - Mathematical Logic - Propositional Logic

questions.question:
Which of the following statements is false?



Mathematical Logic: NIELIT 2017 July Scientist B (IT)
options: \( (P\land Q)\lor(\sim P\land Q)\lor(P \land \sim Q) \) is equal to \( \sim Q\land \sim P \)
\( (P\land Q)\lor(\sim P\land Q)\lor(P \wedge \sim Q) \) is equal to \( Q\lor P \)
\( (P\wedge Q)\lor (\sim P\land Q)\lor(P \wedge \sim Q) \) is equal to \( Q\lor (P\wedge \sim Q) \)
\( (P\land Q)\lor(\sim P\land Q)\lor (P \land \sim Q) \) is equal to \( P\lor (Q\land \sim P) \)
questions.correct_answer: \( (P\land Q)\lor(\sim P\land Q)\lor(P \land \sim Q) \) is equal to \( \sim Q\land \sim P \)

questions.question:
Given the truth table of a Binary Operation \$ as follows:

$$\begin{array}{|l|l|l|l|} \hline {}   \text{X}  &  \text{Y }&  \text{X\$Y }\\ \hline  \text{1}  &  \text{0 }&  \text{1 }\\ \hline  \text{1}  &  \text{1}&  \text{1 }\\ \hline  \text{0}  &  \text{1 }&  \text{0 }\\ \hline  \text{0}  &  \text{0 }&  \text{1 }\\ \hline  \end{array}$$

Identify the matching Boolean Expression.



Mathematical Logic: NIELIT Scientist B 2020 November: 84
